title: Document Summary
description:
AI analyzes document content and generates summaries in various styles.
Supports one-line summary, key points, structured outline, and academic abstract.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the core content of the following document in one sentence, no more than 50 words
promptPlaceholder: Describe the summary style you need...
emptyContent: ❌ Document content is empty, cannot generate summary.
selectStyleHint: Select a style above to generate summary
systemPrompt: You are a professional document analysis assistant, skilled at extracting and summarizing document content. Output the result directly without additional explanations or prefixes.
promptBuilderDesc: Select a summary style to auto-generate the prompt
